title: Neo Editorial Concept Metaphor Poster AI
sourceTitle: Neo Editorial Concept Metaphor Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Award-worthy neo-editorial graphic design poster for Stay Focused. Subject: a matte black camera-lens tower sliced into suspended concentric layers with one sharp red focal beam passing through the center becomes the powerful central sculptural metaphor for Stay Focused, with clear conceptual weight rather than decoration. Scene: Clean minimal light-gray editorial background with generous whitespace, Swiss grid tension, asymmetric balance, and exhibition-style hierarchy. Composition: Fixed centered or near-centered vertical composition with strong vertical tension, oversized bold black headline at top, secondary subtitle, annotation text, and precise modern editorial spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved neo editorial concept metaphor poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Accent Color: electric red. Style: D&AD / Awwwards / Behance quality contemporary editorial poster, premium product-quality render, matte surfaces, hard-edge cuts, slight inter-layer translucency, suspended sliced structures, and crisp silhouettes. Color Palette: Fixed black, white, and gray dominant system with Create a powerful central visual metaphor for this theme — transform the concept into a sculptural, iconic, installation-like object that is cut, layered, stretched, stacked, reconstructed, wrapped, or deconstructed, as the single striking accent color. Lighting: Refined studio render lighting with subtle reflections, hard-edge shadow detail, suspended structure depth, and clean material readability. Typography: STAY FOCUSED appears as oversized bold English headline; CUT THROUGH THE NOISE appears as restrained subtitle; annotation text stays minimal and aligned to the Swiss editorial grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
